description.en: Search for GitHub repositories using GitHub's search API. Supports filtering by language, stars, forks, and more.
description.de: Suche nach GitHub-Repositories mit der GitHub-Such-API. Unterstützt Filterung nach Sprache, Stars, Forks und mehr.
description.es: Search for GitHub repositories using GitHub's search API. Supports filtering by language, stars, forks, and more.
description.fr: Search for GitHub repositories using GitHub's search API. Supports filtering by language, stars, forks, and more.
description.ro: Search for GitHub repositories using GitHub's search API. Supports filtering by language, stars, forks, and more.
description.it: Search for GitHub repositories using GitHub's search API. Supports filtering by language, stars, forks, and more.

vars.API_KEY: env:GITHUB_TOKEN|Get your personal access token from https://github.com/settings/tokens

description.en: The search query. Supports GitHub search syntax (e.g., 'language:javascript stars:>100').
description.es: The search query. Supports GitHub search syntax (e.g., 'language:javascript stars:>100').
description.fr: The search query. Supports GitHub search syntax (e.g., 'language:javascript stars:>100').
description.ro: The search query. Supports GitHub search syntax (e.g., 'language:javascript stars:>100').
description.it: The search query. Supports GitHub search syntax (e.g., 'language:javascript stars:>100').

description.en: Sort results by: stars, forks, help-wanted-issues, updated. Defaults to best match.
description.es: Sort results by: stars, forks, help-wanted-issues, updated. Defaults to best match.
description.fr: Sort results by: stars, forks, help-wanted-issues, updated. Defaults to best match.
description.ro: Sort results by: stars, forks, help-wanted-issues, updated. Defaults to best match.
description.it: Sort results by: stars, forks, help-wanted-issues, updated. Defaults to best match.

description.en: Sort order: asc or desc. Defaults to desc.
description.es: Sort order: asc or desc. Defaults to desc.
description.fr: Sort order: asc or desc. Defaults to desc.
description.ro: Sort order: asc or desc. Defaults to desc.
description.it: Sort order: asc or desc. Defaults to desc.

description.en: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.es: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.fr: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.ro: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
description.it: Number of results per page (max 100). Defaults to 30.
